dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 6004 IH: Sgt. Alfredo Freddy Gonzalez Memorial Veterans’ Hospital Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Ms. De La Cruz introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Veterans' Affairs

form.official-title: To authorize the Secretary of Veterans Affairs to construct a hospital under the jurisdiction of the Department of Veterans Affairs in the Rio Grande Valley sector, Texas.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Sgt. Alfredo Freddy Gonzalez Memorial Veterans’ Hospital Act.

section.header: Authority to construct Department of Veterans Affairs hospital, Rio Grande Valley Sector, Texas

subsection.text: Subject to the availability of appropriations made in advance for such purpose, the Secretary of Veterans Affairs may construct a hospital under the jurisdiction of the Department of Veterans Affairs in the Rio Grande Valley sector, Texas.

The hospital authorized under subsection (a) shall, after the date of the enactment of this Act, be known and designated as the Sgt. Alfredo Freddy Gonzalez Memorial Veterans’ Hospital. Any reference to such hospital in any law, regulation, map, document, record, or other paper of the United States shall be considered to be a reference to the Sgt. Alfredo Freddy Gonzalez Memorial Veterans’ Hospital.
